caption: A football video game depicts a play on a green field with white yard markers and a red line. Players in white uniforms and black uniforms are spread across the field. In the top frames, a player in a white jersey with the number 24 runs toward the left while a player in a black uniform chases from the right. Overlaid in the bottom-left of these frames is a video of a man with blonde hair wearing headphones. On-screen text in the top frames reads "PERFECT ACCURACY" and "BULLET PASS," while a scoreboard at the top shows "1st & 10" and a clock at "0:41" and "0:40." As the scene progresses into the bottom frames, the camera angle shifts to a closer side view. A player in a black uniform tackles the player wearing number 24, bringing him to the ground, while other players in black and white uniforms converge on the play.
